title: RTP-Pure
description: A highly customisable Minecraft plugin that adds Random Teleportation with a sleek GUI. It supports all worlds and is optimised for maximum performance. rtp
body:
![RTP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e998cc42a1ec003fde0ef4bf4cb1a5b9e5f78e96_0.webp)

⠀⠀⠀⠀🌐 PureRTP – Random Teleport Plugin with GUI


---

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀Overview

PureRTP is a highly customizable Minecraft plugin that introduces
random teleportation through an intuitive GUI. Designed with performance
in mind, it supports multiple worlds and offers extensive configuration options.

---

Random Teleportation – Seamless and safe player teleportation
GUI Interface – Intuitive click-based world selection
Multi-World Support – Easily configurable per world
Performance Optimized – Runs asynchronously where possible
Customisable – GUI icons, names, lore, and ranges fully adjustable
SafeLocationFinder – Prevents lava, void and spawn-in-walls issues

---

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀Installation

1. Download the latest .jar from GitHub or Modrinth  
2. Drop it into your /plugins/ folder  
3. Restart your server

The config and GUI will be auto-generated and can be customised live.

---

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀Configuration Highlights

You can configure:
• Cooldown time per use
• World buttons in GUI (material, name, lore, range)
• MiniMessage-based messages
• Fallback messages when teleport fails
All inside: plugins/PureRTP/config.yml

---

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀Commands & Permissions

/rtp – Opens the teleportation GUI → rtp.use
/rtp reload – Reloads plugin configuration → rtp.reload

---

⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀Note

Please do not re-upload this plugin to Modrinth or other platforms.
A license is included in the GitHub repository for reference.
